name: Nova Wireless Mechanical Keyboard
shortDescription: Compact 75% mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches and RGB lighting.

name: Pulse ANC Headphones
shortDescription: Over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation and 40-hour battery life.

name: Orbit 4K Monitor
shortDescription: 27-inch 4K IPS monitor with HDR support and ultra-thin bezels.

name: Spark Wireless Mouse
shortDescription: Ergonomic Bluetooth mouse with silent clicks and USB-C charging.

name: Titan USB-C Hub
shortDescription: 7-in-1 USB-C hub with HDMI, Ethernet, SD card reader, and Power Delivery.

name: Echo Smart Speaker
shortDescription: Voice-controlled smart speaker with rich stereo sound and Wi-Fi connectivity.
